scripts.build: npm run build -w @linear/shared && npm run build -w @linear/client-sync && npm run build -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @linear/shared && npm run test -w @linear/client-sync && npm run test:e2e -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @linear/shared && npm run lint -w @linear/client-sync && npm run lint -w backend
